zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell於大約1210年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾時，她的父親Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children23歲，母親Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd24歲。她於大約1250年與Owain ap Bleddyn在英國威爾斯丹比爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell于大约1210年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾时，她的父亲Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children23岁，母亲Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd24岁。她于大约1250年与Owain ap Bleddyn在英国威尔斯丹比爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell was born about 1210, in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, was 23 and her mother, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, was 24. She married Owain ap Bleddyn about 1250, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell est née environ 1210, à Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Owain ap Bleddyn environ 1250, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell um 1210 in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children 23 und ihre Mutter Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd 24. Sie hat um 1250 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom Owain ap Bleddyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell è nata il circa 1210 nel Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Owain ap Bleddyn circa 1250, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangellが約1210年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアペナント-メランジェルで生まれた時，父Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Childrenは23歳，母Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdrydは24歳であった。約1250年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアでOwain ap Bleddynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell(이)가 대략 1210년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 펜넌트-멀랭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 Owain ap Bleddyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Owain ap Bleddyn aproximadamente 1250, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell родилась около 1210 г. в местности пеннант-мелангелл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owain ap Bleddyn около 1250 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Madog ap Rhirld Flaidd of Pennant Melangell nació aproximadamente 1210, en Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Owain ap Bleddyn aproximadamente 1250, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
